title: lithocarpus longinux
intro: Lithocarpus longinux is a species of plant in the beech family, Fagaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and treating respiratory issues. Lithocarpus longinux can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
